headline: Is It Worth Investing in Cardinal (CAH) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Cardinal (CAH) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Headwinds
